2603.26551.title: Beyond MACs: Hardware Efficient Architecture Design for Vision Backbones
2603.26551.paper_summary: Vision backbone networks play a central role in modern computer vision. Enhancing their efficiency directly benefits a wide range of downstream applications. To measure efficiency, many publications rely on MACs (Multiply Accumulate operations) as a predictor of execution time. In this paper, we experimentally demonstrate the shortcomings of such a metric, especially in the context of edge devices. By contrasting the MAC count and execution time of common architectural design elements, we identify key factors for efficient execution and provide insights to optimize backbone design. Based on these insights, we present LowFormer, a novel vision backbone family. LowFormer features a streamlined macro and micro design that includes Lowtention, a lightweight alternative to Multi-Head Self-Attention. Lowtention not only proves more efficient, but also enables superior results on ImageNet. Additionally, we present an edge GPU version of LowFormer, that can further improve upon its baseline's speed on edge GPU and desktop GPU. We demonstrate LowFormer's wide applicability by evaluating it on smaller image classification datasets, as well as adapting it to several downstream tasks, such as object detection, semantic segmentation, image retrieval, and visual object tracking. LowFormer models consistently achieve remarkable speed-ups across various hardware platforms compared to recent state-of-the-art backbones. Code and models are available at https://github.com/altair199797/LowFormer/blob/main/Beyond_MACs.md.
2603.26551.paper_summary_zh: 視覺骨幹網絡在現代計算機視覺中扮演著核心角色。提高它們的效率直接惠及廣泛的下游應用。為了衡量效率，許多出版物依賴於 MAC（乘加運算）作為執行時間的預測指標。在本文中，我們實驗性地展示了這種指標的不足之處，特別是在邊緣設備的背景下。通過對比常見架構設計元素的 MAC 計數和執行時間，我們確定了高效執行的關鍵因素，並提供了優化骨幹設計的見解。基於這些見解，我們提出了 LowFormer，一個新穎的視覺骨幹系列。LowFormer 擁有簡化的宏觀和微觀設計，其中包括 Lowtention，一種輕量級的多頭自注意力替代方案。Lowtention 不僅證明了更高的效率，還在 ImageNet 上實現了更優的結果。此外，我們還提出了 LowFormer 的邊緣 GPU 版本，這可以進一步提高其基線在邊緣 GPU 和桌面 GPU 上的速度。我們通過在較小的圖像分類數據集上評估 LowFormer，並將其適應於多個下游任務，如物體檢測、語義分割、圖像檢索和視覺物體跟踪，來展示 LowFormer 的廣泛適用性。與最近的最先進骨幹相比，LowFormer 模型在各種硬體平台上始終實現了顯著的加速。代碼和模型可在 https://github.com/altair199797/LowFormer/blob/main/Beyond_MACs.md 獲得。
2603.26551.author: Moritz Nottebaum et.al.
2603.26551.authors: Moritz Nottebaum, Matteo Dunnhofer, Christian Micheloni
